skills.name: sitemap
skills.description: Discover Orquestra's dynamic sitemap and canonical URLs.

skills.name: link-headers
skills.description: Discover the Link headers published on Orquestra HTML responses.

skills.name: markdown-negotiation
skills.description: Request markdown representations of Orquestra HTML pages.

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: Discover the Orquestra API catalog and related machine-readable artifacts.

skills.name: oauth-discovery
skills.description: Locate OAuth and OpenID discovery metadata for the Orquestra API.

skills.name: oauth-protected-resource
skills.description: Locate OAuth protected resource metadata for the Orquestra API.

skills.name: mcp-server-card
skills.description: Discover the MCP server card for the Orquestra MCP endpoint.

skills.name: agent-skills
skills.description: Discover the Agent Skills index published by Orquestra.

skills.name: webmcp
skills.description: Use WebMCP tools exposed by the Orquestra web app.
